classificationRules.allowed_historical_reference: Permitted only when explicitly describing legacy or historical context.
classificationRules.uploaded_reference_out_of_scope: Permitted only when classifying an uploaded/external source as not NODAL OS scope.
classificationRules.contamination_to_fix: Any active release/package/store/roadmap reference that suggests another project is active.
classificationRules.legacy_filename_allowed: Existing historical filename retained for traceability.
classificationRules.test_fixture_allowed: Forbidden-name guard tests and compatibility fixtures.
classificationRules.report_context_allowed: Audit reports that explicitly classify non-NODAL names as inactive.
classificationRules.active_product_naming_error: Any active-product field naming another product.
